releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description: Text-to-speech (3 engines), security compliance, bundle optimization (16MB→2.7MB). See CHANGELOG.md.

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Changes

### AudioWorklet migration
- Replaced deprecated `ScriptProcessorNode` with modern `AudioWorklet` API
- Uses inline Blob URL approach compatible with Obsidian's plugin architecture
- Removed all deprecated Web Audio APIs: `ScriptProcessorNode`, `createScriptProcessor`, `onaudioprocess`, `AudioProcessingEvent`, `inputBuffer`

### Sentence case compliance
- Fixed 26 sentence case violations across toolbar tooltips and settings UI per Obsidian plugin guidelines
- All UI text now uses sentence case (only first word and proper nouns capitalized)

### Full Changelog
https://github.com/JuracyAmerico/obsidian-teleprompter-plus/compare/0.9.15...0.9.16

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
- Changed author display name to 'Americo'
- Added Obsidian callout support with proper styling
- Fixed inline markdown rendering inside callouts (bold, italic, links)

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
### Bug Fix

- **Fixed plugin not loading** - Settings were accessed before they finished loading asynchronously. Now properly awaits settings before initializing WebSocket server and OBS service.

This fixes: `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'autoStartWebSocket')`

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description: Updated description for community plugin submission: changed 'Stream Deck integration' to 'external device integration' to comply with sentence case requirements.

All ObsidianReviewBot code quality checks now pass.

- Fix OBS command names to standard Obsidian format (e.g., "Connect to OBS" instead of "OBS: connect")
- Fix proper noun capitalization: "OBS Studio", "WebSocket server"
- Change settings heading to plugin name
- Simplify text to avoid sentence case conflicts
- Version bump to 0.9.9

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Fix 35 sentence case violations in UI text (ObsidianReviewBot requirement)
- Fix plugin name in settings heading
- Fix Promise in void context for ConfirmModal callbacks
- Fix 44 Promise-returning async functions to use void operator
- Improve code quality for Obsidian community plugin submission

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Fixes
- Converted all async callbacks to sync with void operator pattern
- Fixed Promise-returning functions in void contexts
- Addresses ObsidianReviewBot code quality requirements

This release ensures compliance with Obsidian plugin best practices for async code patterns.

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Fixes

This release addresses all ObsidianReviewBot code quality issues:

### Sentence Case
- Fixed 15+ UI strings (WebSocket → websocket)
- Fixed OBS command names
- Fixed settings headings

### Promise Handling
- Added void operator to floating promises
- Removed async from functions without await

### Type Safety
- Added missing WorkspaceLeaf import
- Fixed unused variable warnings

This version is ready for community plugin submission.

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Changes in v0.9.5

### Additional Code Quality Improvements for PR #9198

This release addresses remaining ObsidianReviewBot issues:

- **Block Scope**: Added braces to switch case statements with lexical declarations
- **Type Safety**: Removed unnecessary type assertions, fixed WebSocket types
- **Sync Methods**: Converted async methods without await to synchronous
- **Error Handling**: Promise rejections now properly wrapped in Error objects
- **Clean Code**: Removed unused variables and imports

No functional changes - this is a code quality release for community plugin submission.

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Changes in v0.9.4

### Code Quality Improvements for Community Plugin Submission

This release addresses all ObsidianReviewBot code quality issues from PR #9198:

- **UI Text**: Converted to sentence case throughout the plugin
- **TypeScript**: Replaced `NodeJS.Timeout` with `ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>` for cross-platform compatibility
- **Console Output**: Changed `console.log` to `console.debug` where appropriate
- **Command Names**: Removed redundant "(command)" suffixes

No functional changes - this is a code quality release for community plugin submission.

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## What's Changed

This release addresses code quality issues flagged by ObsidianReviewBot:

### Fixes

1. **Sentence case for UI text** - All command names now use sentence case instead of Title Case
2. **Settings heading** - Uses `Setting().setHeading()` API instead of `createEl('h2')`
3. **innerHTML security** - Replaced with Obsidian's `createEl()`/`appendText()` API
4. **Async methods** - Removed unnecessary async keywords and properly handle promises
5. **Hardcoded .obsidian** - Removed fallback strings, now requires configDir

### Full Changelog

https://github.com/JuracyAmerico/obsidian-teleprompter-plus/compare/0.9.2...0.9.3
releases.name: v0.9.3 - Code Quality Fixes

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## Code Quality Fixes

This release addresses all code review feedback from ObsidianReviewBot:

### Changes
- Eliminated all `any` types - using proper interfaces and `Record<string, unknown>`
- Replaced `confirm()` dialogs with Obsidian modals (`ConfirmModal`)
- Changed `console.log` to `console.debug` in plugin code
- Replaced inline styles with CSS utility classes
- Fixed `NodeJS.Timeout` types for cross-platform compatibility

No functional changes - this is purely a code quality update for community plugin submission.
releases.name: 0.9.2 - Code Quality Fixes

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description: Plugin ID fix + description punctuation fix

releases.author: JuracyAmerico
releases.description:
## 🎉 What's New in v0.9.0

### 📱 Remote Web Interface
Control your teleprompter from any device on your network!

- **Mobile-optimized UI** - Touch-friendly controls for phone/tablet
- **Real-time sync** - Instant state synchronization via WebSocket
- **Full playback controls** - Play/pause, speed, countdown
- **Section navigation** - Jump to headers with a tap

### ✨ Other Highlights
- **What's New modal** - See new features on install/update
- **Ko-fi support** - Support development at ko-fi.com/americocanada

### 🐛 Fixes
- Fixed section headers showing as `[object Object]` in remote interface
- Added missing countdown events for remote control
- Improved mobile touch reliability

---

## 📦 Installation

### Manual Installation
1. Download `obsidian-teleprompter-plus-v0.9.0.zip`
2. Extract to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` folder
3. Enable in Settings → Community Plugins

### Files Included
- `main.js` - Plugin code
- `styles.css` - Styles
- `manifest.json` - Plugin manifest

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JuracyAmerico/obsidian-teleprompter-plus/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: v0.9.0 - Remote Web Interface
